prompt: Use the uploaded character as the sole identity reference, maintaining facial features, facial proportions, long black hair, thin silver-framed glasses, a cool temperament, and realistic natural expressions. Create a high-completion vertical sci-fi mecha poster, ratio 4:5. The visual style is high-end cyberpunk x mecha warrior x Japanese anime promotional poster x futuristic street fashion editorial. The subject is a young Asian woman sitting on the edge of a city ruin rooftop or industrial roof, with a giant mechanical beast / mechanical lion-tiger / mecha Liger behind her. It has a massive body, white and black metal armor, glowing red eyes, sharp mechanical teeth, complex armor structure, hydraulic joints, mechanical spine, red energy lines, exposed cables, and battle damage details. The person wears futuristic techwear street combat gear: red functional jacket / white tech hoodie / black tactical bodysuit (variable); paired with black cargo pants, tactical skirt, functional suspenders, red streamers, metal buckles, half-finger gloves, and platform tech sneakers. The overall clothing color scheme is black, white, and red, with tactical labels, numbers, a mecha pilot feel, and a street fashion sense. Natural and powerful posture: sitting / squatting / single-knee support / leaning on the rooftop edge, eyes looking directly at the camera, expression can be calm, firm, smiling, tipsy, confident, or battle-ready. Face should not be stiff, skin realistic, features delicate but not overly plastic, hair with a slight wind-blown effect. The background is a futuristic city rooftop with high-rise buildings, antennas, industrial structures, cloudy skies, or blue-gray cloud layers in the distance. The foreground has worn concrete walls, graffiti, red spray paint, scratches, metal fragments, dust, and battle traces. The overall atmosphere is grand, dangerous, fashionable, and cinematic. Incorporate many high-end poster layout elements: large title 'NEXORA' in the upper left corner in a bold white graffiti font with red X scratches behind it; add vertical Japanese text, English mecha serial numbers, HUD parameters, warning labels, barcodes, industrial markings, combat data panels, red and white thin line decorations, scanning boxes, brand logos, and a futuristic layout system. The typography should combine Japanese mecha anime posters with high-end game character setting posters, dense but orderly. Visual style: ultra detailed, cinematic lighting, photorealistic sci-fi poster, cyberpunk mecha fashion editorial, high contrast, sharp focus, dynamic low-angle perspective, dramatic sky, realistic skin texture, premium poster design, red black white color palette, gritty rooftop, mechanical beast guardian, Japanese typography, futuristic HUD, fashion magazine composition, 8k concept art quality. Avoid: collapsed faces, stiff expressions, distorted glasses, incorrect fingers, weird body proportions, excessive garbled text, empty backgrounds, blurry mecha details, low quality, plastic skin, excessive sexiness, overly cartoonish.
